title: FabricOptimized
description: This modpack ONLY includes fabric optimization mods that are found on Modrinth.
body:
# FabricOptimized
- Only includes optimization mods found on Modrinth
- Modpack by kyoleaff
- Other people, not me made mods included

## Mod's Included
- Sodium (Reese's Options and Sodium Extra)
- Dynamic FPS
- Memory Leak Fix
- Idle Tweaks
- BadOptimizations
- Lithium
- Iris Shaders
- Your Options Shall Be Respected
- LazyDFU
- FerriteCore
- Mod Menu
- Fast Quit
- Better Mount HUD
- Zoomify
- Krypton
- Remove Reloading Screen
- Debugify
- Model Gap Fix
- Indium
- Chat Heads
- Chunky
- Better Beds
- ModernFix
- Very Many Players
- NoChatReports
- Language Reload
- Dark Loading Screen
- Entity Culling
- Blur+
- Noxesium
- Simple Autoswitch
- Dynamic Lights
- More Culling
- ImmediatelyFast
- Clean F3
- Ksyxis
- ToolTipFix
## API's and Required Libraries
- Fabric API
- Satin API
- Midnight Lib
- Fabric Language Kotlin
- Cloth Config API
- YetAnotherConfigLib
### (optional) Shaders included
- BSL Shaders
- Complimentary Shaders Reimagined
